layout.motivation:
Anki Japanese Learning Plan (Start: ~5000 Words)

Goal: ~20k+ vocabulary and very high reading ability by ~2028.

Current Setup
Anki vocabulary deck
RTK kanji deck
Daily Japanese input already started

2026 - Build Advanced Foundation
Daily: 15-20 new words / 5 RTK kanji
Input: podcasts, YouTube, shows
Reading: 20-40 minutes per day
Result: +5.5k-7.3k words -> total ~10k-12k

2027 - Transition to Reading
Daily: 10-15 new words (mostly mined from content)
Reading: 45-60 minutes per day
Content: books / essays / news
Result: +3.6k-5.5k words -> total ~14k-17k

2028 - Advanced Phase
Daily: 5-10 new words
Reading: 1-2 hours per day
Most new vocabulary comes from reading
Result: +2k-3.5k words -> total ~18k-20k+

Milestones
~8k words -> podcasts and simple texts comfortable
~12k words -> news and many books readable
~15k+ words -> most general texts understandable
~20k+ words -> very high proficiency

日本語勉強モチベーション

就活をするため、いい会社に入りたいから
日本人の友だちをつくるようになる
本や映画や日本の文化のもの日本語でたのしめるようになる
